message: Small update: BIO-SYNTH V2.4 holographic heart (ECG telemetry, crisis scenarios, labeled anatomy) + snappy Force & Motion drop FX.
releaseNotes: 1.0.3 — Bio-Synth V2.4 HUD matching demo mockup: LIVE TELEMETRY, holographic labeled heart, EMERGENCY_SHUTDOWN / RECALIBRATE_NODES, SIMULATE_EVENT (MI, Arrhythmia, Hypertension, Hypovolemic Shock). Force & Motion: ~1–2s vacuum drop with impact FX. Small update: re-open the app to apply.
